name: Marlok
bio:
The Blazing Blade of Demon Nobility, who unleashes swift attacks with the Void Rending Blade. Eager to prove his strength, he became a terrifying legend in the Demon Army.

Role: Physical Lifesteal
Intro: A Physical Damage Dealer hero that can increase its own Lifesteal Rate and generate a shield for allies with low HP.

skillSlots.name: Echo of Blood
skillSlots.description: Attacks a single enemy, dealing 159% P.DMG while increasing own Lifesteal Rate by 15% for 2 turns.

skillSlots.name: Wicked Blade Assault
skillSlots.description: Attacks a single enemy target, dealing 233% P.DMG, converting 30% of DMG dealt into a [Shield] for the ally with lowest HP Ratio, lasting 2 turns.
